title: India's GDP Growth Projected at 7.1% for FY27 by S&P Global
shortDescription: S&P Global has raised India's GDP growth forecast for the next fiscal year to 7.1%, citing strong domestic consumption and investment momentum.
fullContent: S&P Global Ratings has upwardly revised India's real GDP growth forecast for the fiscal year 2026-27 to 7.1%, up from its previous estimate of 6.7%.

title: Global Inflation Trends: Central Banks Eye Soft Landing in 2026
shortDescription: Economists predict a steady decline in core inflation across G7 nations, potentially leading to a series of rate cuts by the Federal Reserve and ECB.
fullContent: As supply chain pressures ease and monetary policy remains restrictive, global central banks are navigating toward a non-recessionary slowdown.
